summary: End-to-end verification of the Onboarding & Profile-Photo completion automation. 15/15 pytest API tests pass (settings, dashboard, run-now, RBAC, employee self-snapshot, reminder-count increment). Synthetic 100% complete employee test (Rishi) end-to-end: success email fired once via Resend (success_sent=1, completion_success_mail_sent=True), second run-now correctly idempotent (skipped=1). Pilot-mode safety confirmed: bulk-toggle off restricts scan to exactly 1 employee row (Rishi only). Frontend /onboarding-completion renders cleanly with all required data-testids, summary chips, 6 filter buttons, search input, pilot-email input populated with rishi.nayak@blubridge.com, bulk-toggle Switch, Run Now button, refresh button, 54 employee rows with per-row send buttons. Sidebar nav shows 'Onboarding & Photo' link to /onboarding-completion for sysadmin. All synthetic mutations to Rishi's data were reverted cleanly.

minor.issue: Observed one transient ReadTimeout (>20s) during initial pytest run; subsequent runs <1s. Likely cold-start / first-hit. Bumped test client timeout to 60s as mitigation.

issues: Filter button 'Incomplete' shows same 54 rows as 'All' — expected because 54/54 employees are currently incomplete in seed data (Completed=0). Not a bug; confirmed by summary chips.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~14500 lines — far exceeds the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting into route modules (auth, employees, attendance, onboarding, payroll, etc.). The onboarding_completion.py module is a great example of the target pattern.
Hard-coded MongoDB credentials in backend/.env are visible in plain text — fine for dev but rotate before production.

In onboarding_completion.py _send_success, in PILOT mode the success email is routed to pilot_email only — make sure HR is aware that the actual employee will not get their celebration email until enable_bulk_onboarding_mail=True (well documented in code, but flag for HR comms).
test_credentials: sysadmin / pass123 used for admin; kasper / pass123 used for employee RBAC negative tests. Rishi pilot recipient: 2ce742cb-f44b-4224-b19b-4dd44ca6ae51 / rishi.nayak@blubridge.com.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily inserted 4 synthetic verified onboarding_documents + avatar URL on Rishi to exercise success-email path. ALL reverted (original avatar=None, original docs (9) restored, original state restored) at end of test. Verified clean revert in script output.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All onboarding-completion endpoints verified end-to-end including the success-mail idempotency path. Pilot-mode safety holds (scanned<=1). Backend e2e suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_onboarding_completion_e2e.py — reusable as regression. Synthetic success-email script at /app/backend/tests/synth_success_email_test.py — DESTRUCTIVE on Rishi's row but auto-reverts in try/finally. Resend deliveries are real — all reminders / success emails actually go to rishi.nayak@blubridge.com during pilot mode.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues found. Implementation matches the product spec including pilot-safety guard (server-side regex restriction on official_email in pilot mode), 48h cadence enforcement in business logic (not cron frequency), force=True bypass for /run-now, and one-shot success-mail with completion_success_mail_sent flag idempotency.
